fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the modal.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the modal's content or function.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the record.

events.name: SAVE
events.description: Indicates a successful data save operation.

events.name: CLOSE
events.description: Indicates the modal window is being closed.

events.name: ModalRecordLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load the record data.

events.name: ModalRecordLoaded
events.description: Signals that the modal's data has been successfully loaded.

events.name: OPEN
events.description: A request to display the modal window.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Layout pattern
overridableConfigKeys.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

overridableConfigKeys.label: Render slot
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI slot the modal renders into

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which fields appear in the form?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity fields rendered as inputs inside the modal form.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: form fields, inputs, editable fields, field list

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which icon appears in the modal header?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Lucide icon name shown next to the modal title.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: header icon, modal icon, title icon

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is this for creating or editing?
overridableConfigKeys.description: create = blank form; edit = pre-filled from the selected row.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: form mode, create or edit, new or update, add or modify

overridableConfigKeys.label: What should the modal heading say?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading displayed at the top of the modal.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: modal title, dialog heading, panel title, form title
